capabilities.name: TaskExecutionSession
capabilities.description: Persisted execution session for a runtime task.

methods.name: create
methods.doc: Create a fresh active session.

methods.name: from_dict
methods.doc: Hydrate a session from storage.

methods.name: to_dict
methods.doc: Serialize the session.

methods.name: is_expired
methods.doc: Return whether the lease has expired.

methods.name: renew
methods.doc: Renew the active lease.

methods.name: mark_completed
methods.doc: Mark the session as completed.

methods.name: mark_failed
methods.doc: Mark the session as failed.

methods.name: mark_suspended
methods.doc: Mark the session as suspended and optionally resumable.

capabilities.name: utc_now_iso
capabilities.description: Return the current UTC timestamp in ISO-8601 format.

capabilities.name: normalize_positive_int
capabilities.description: Convert arbitrary input into a bounded positive integer.

capabilities.name: TaskRuntimeService
capabilities.description: Runtime task lifecycle service for the ``runtime.task_runtime`` cell.

methods.name: ensure_task_row
methods.doc: Materialize a legacy/orchestration task into the canonical taskboard.

methods.name: select_next_task
methods.doc: Return the next claimable task row, preferring resumable work.

methods.name: claim_execution
methods.doc: Claim a task for execution and persist a lease-backed session.

methods.name: heartbeat_execution
methods.doc: Renew an existing task lease.

methods.name: complete_execution
methods.doc: Finalize a claimed task as completed.

methods.name: fail_execution
methods.doc: Finalize a claimed task as failed.

methods.name: suspend_execution
methods.doc: Suspend a claimed task so it can be resumed later.

methods.name: _get_session_lock
methods.doc: Return the per-task session lock, creating it on demand.

capabilities.name: TaskStatus
capabilities.description: Task lifecycle states used by the Polaris TaskBoard.

capabilities.name: TaskPriority
capabilities.description: Compatibility priority labels (string-valued for JSON serialisation).

capabilities.name: InvalidTaskStateTransitionError
capabilities.description: Raised when a task status transition is not allowed.

capabilities.name: Task
capabilities.description: A task with dependency tracking for the Polaris TaskBoard.

capabilities.name: TaskBoard
capabilities.description: File-backed task board with dependency graph.

methods.name: transaction
methods.doc: Board-level transaction lock for atomic cache+filesystem updates.

methods.name: _load_all
methods.doc: Load all tasks from disk into in-memory cache.

methods.name: _save_task
methods.doc: Atomically save a task to disk (write-to-temp + os.replace).

methods.name: _file_lock
methods.doc: Cross-platform exclusive file lock context manager.

methods.name: _get_next_id
methods.doc: Get next task ID with cross-process file locking.

methods.name: create
methods.doc: Create a new task.

methods.name: get
methods.doc: Get a task by numeric ID. Returns a deep copy.

methods.name: get_task
methods.doc: Compatibility helper: get task as dict, supports 'task-N' tokens.

methods.name: update_status
methods.doc: Update task status with state machine validation.

methods.name: _unblock_dependent_tasks
methods.doc: Remove completed task from blocked_by lists of dependent tasks.

methods.name: _write_terminal_event
methods.doc: Write terminal event to JSONL outside the board transaction lock.

methods.name: update
methods.doc: Compatibility update API (delegates to update_status).

methods.name: assign
methods.doc: Assign task owner without changing execution status.

methods.name: claim
methods.doc: Claim a task for a worker (READY -> CLAIMED).

methods.name: reopen
methods.doc: Reopen a terminal task for another implementation round.

methods.name: get_ready_tasks
methods.doc: Get all tasks that are pending, unblocked, and unclaimed.

methods.name: list_ready
methods.doc: Compatibility alias for role-agent worker polling.

methods.name: list_my_tasks
methods.doc: List all tasks assigned to a specific worker.

methods.name: get_blocked_tasks
methods.doc: Get all tasks that are currently blocked by dependencies.

methods.name: get_dependency_graph
methods.doc: Get full dependency graph for a task (upstream + downstream).

methods.name: list_all
methods.doc: List tasks with optional filtering, sorted by priority desc then created_at asc.

methods.name: get_critical_path
methods.doc: Estimate the critical path — longest chain of dependencies.

methods.name: get_stats
methods.doc: Get board statistics.

capabilities.name: TaskBoardToolInterface
capabilities.description: Tool interface for task board operations (LLM tool calling).

methods.name: task_create
methods.doc: Tool: Create a new task.

methods.name: task_update
methods.doc: Tool: Update task status.

methods.name: task_list
methods.doc: Tool: List tasks.

methods.name: task_dependencies
methods.doc: Tool: Get dependency graph for a task.

methods.name: task_ready
methods.doc: Tool: Get all ready-to-work tasks.

methods.name: task_assign
methods.doc: Tool: Assign task to owner.

capabilities.name: create_taskboard
capabilities.description: Compatibility factory used by role-agent subsystem.
